cases.title: AI Model Timeout Forces Fallback HOLD Decision on Open Position

observerFinding.title: AI Model Timeout Forces Fallback HOLD Decision on Open Position
evidence: Tick 63: Position is PUT, current price $0.27, entry $0.28
observerFinding.summary: The current position mindset indicates an 'AI response failure' with the reasoning 'GEMINI_LIVE_TIMEOUT,' resulting in a FALLBACK decision to HOLD. This demonstrates a failure in active model management due to external model latency, preventing fresh tactical assessments for the open position at tick 63.
observerFinding.suggested_action: Investigate the cause of the AI response timeout to ensure consistent active management.

cases.title: Inaccurate Flat P&L State Reported Despite Active Trade Gain

observerFinding.suggested_action: Investigate the P&L calculation logic within the intent state. Ensure the 'option P/L' and 'flat' status accurately reflect the current option price vs. entry price, rather than potentially using stale reference prices or flawed capping logic.
observerFinding.title: Inaccurate Flat P&L State Reported Despite Active Trade Gain
observerFinding.summary: At Tick 89, the intent state incorrectly reports '+0.0% option P/L' and lists the attribution status as 'flat: true'. The active 736P position was entered at 0.22 and is currently priced at 0.25, representing a 13.6% gain, contradicting the reported diagnostic data.
evidence: Tick 89 (10:58 AM) screenshot shows active PUT position, current option price 0.25 vs entry 0.22.
Snapshot attribution at Tick 89 shows 'flat: true', despite the option price increase from 0.22 to 0.25 (a 13.6% gain).
Current intent factors state '+0.0% option P/L' at Tick 89.
